attribution.name: NeoForged primers
attribution.includedContent: Compact searchable summaries, content hashes, source paths, headings, and previews.

attribution.name: misode technical changes
attribution.includedContent: Compact searchable summaries, content hashes, source paths, headings, and previews.

entries.title: Minecraft 26.2 version-change sources
entries.summary: Authoritative version-change evidence should combine NeoForged primers for loader migration notes with misode technical-changes markdown for vanilla data and resource format changes.

entries.title: misode 26.2-snapshot-1 technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 101.2.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking obsolete | Data pack format has been increased to 101.2.

pack breaking obsolete | Resource pack format has been increased to 85.0.

shader | Profiling the game with Tracy (launching with --tracy) now includes GPU timings.

shader | Rendering now uses a reversed depth buffer, which helps with Z-fighting on most hardware.

entity | Added sulfur_cube_archetype registry, defining archetypes that Sulfur Cubes can take.

command | When granting or revoking several advancements, the command output will now report how many advancements changed state across all players.

command | When granting or revoking advancements or a criterion on several players, the command output will now report the number of players that any change applied to.

attribute | Added bounciness attribute, which determines what portion of velocity is restituted after the entity collides with blocks and collidable entities.

attribute | Added friction_modifier attribute, which determines how much ground friction is applied to the entity with regards to the block it is on.

attribute | Added air_drag_modifier attribute, which determines how much drag is applied to an entity while in the air.

attribute brea

entries.title: misode 26.2-snapshot-2 technical changes
entries.summary: debug | The FPS entry in the F3 debug screen now reports which type of present mode is used, instead of just vsync.

metadata.preview: debug | The FPS entry in the F3 debug screen now reports which type of present mode is used, instead of just vsync.

entries.title: misode 26.2-snapshot-3 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 102.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 102.0.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 86.0.

block block-entity breaking | The bed block entity has been removed.

predicate breaking | Entity predicate format has changed from a structure with multiple optional fields to one similar to data component maps.

predicate breaking | The type field in entity predicates has been renamed to entity_type.

predicate breaking | Existing type-specific sub-predicates have been renamed and moved to top-level.

predicate | Added entity_tags entity sub-predicate, which matches entity tags set with the /tag command.

worldgen | Adjusted feature type lake.

tag block | Added #speleothems for blocks which are speleothems like pointed dripstone and sulfur spike.

assets | Added new block textures for sulfur spikes.

assets breaking | Beds now use block models and textures.

assets | Added new item sprite item/sulfur_spike.png.

assets breaking | The bed special item model type has been removed.

entries.title: misode 26.2-snapshot-4 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 103.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 103.0.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 86.1.

attribute | Added nameplate_distance attribute, which controls how far away in blocks the nameplate of an entity is visible.

attribute | Added below_name_distance attribute, which controls how far away in blocks the below_name scoreboard display is visible.

predicate breaking | Renamed slime entity sub-predicate from type_specific/slime to type_specific/cube_mob.

assets atlas breaking | The beds atlas has been removed.

meta | Added new required telemetry event graphics_capabilities, which posts on startup and reports the capabilities of the graphics device used to play the game.

entries.title: misode 26.2-snapshot-5 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 104.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 104.0.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 86.2.

scoreboard | A player's score will no longer be displayed in the player tab overlay if the player doesn't have the objective.

network | Minecraft Server Management Protocol version has been increased to 3.0.0.

network | The management server now starts before the Minecraft server starts. This means the heartbeat will be sent while the world is loading.

network | The rpc.discover and notification/server/status methods are now accessible before the dedicated server spins up.

data obsolete | Entries in the sulfur_cube_archetype registry have a new optional field explosion_fuse.

particle | Added geyser, geyser_poof, geyser_base, and geyser_plume particles.

command breaking | Team color arguments now accept only lowercase names with underscores.

attribute breaking | Renamed nameplate_distance attribute to name_tag_distance.

worldgen | Added matching_biomes block predicate type for world generation, which checks if the block position matches one of the specified biomes.

worldgen breaking | The below_trunk_provider block state provider

entries.title: misode 26.2-snapshot-6 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 105.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 105.0.

entity | Added hot and slow_bouncy entries to the sulfur_cube_archetype registry.

entity breaking | Entry format for the sulfur_cube_archetype registry has been updated:

* explosion_fuse has been replaced by explosion: if present, the Sulfur Cube of this archetype will explode.

* Added contact_damage: if present, the Sulfur Cube of this archetype will deal damage to entities when they come in contact with it.

* Added knockback_modifiers: a field that contains various modifier fields for the Sulfur Cube's knockback magnitude and direction.

nbt entity breaking | Removed the HurtByTimestamp tag from living entities. ticks_since_last_hurt_by_mob should be used instead.

worldgen | Added new is_3d field to the noise_threshold surface rule condition. If true, the noise will be evaluated in 3D.

worldgen breaking | Removed the noise_gradient surface rule. It can be replaced with noise_threshold.

worldgen | Added weighted_random_selector feature type, which randomly selects one of the given features to generate based on their weights.

worldgen breaking | The large_dripstone feature has been updated:

* The maxim

entries.title: misode 26.2-snapshot-7 technical changes
entries.summary: pack | Data pack version has been updated to 105.1.

metadata.preview:
pack | Data pack version has been updated to 105.1.

pack | Resource pack version has been updated to 87.0.

tag block | Added #causes_periodic_geyser_eruptions block tag, containing all blocks that cause periodic eruptions of potent sulfur blocks.

tag block | Added #causes_continuous_geyser_eruptions block tag, containing all blocks that cause continuous eruptions of potent sulfur blocks.

assets breaking | Signs and hanging signs now use block models instead of built-in entity models. The text on signs and hanging signs cannot be configured yet.

atlas breaking | The signs atlas has been removed.

assets | Added item sprite item/music_disc_bounce.png.

assets breaking | Added new sign edit screen background textures at gui/sign/<wood_type>.png, replacing <wood_type> with the sign's wood type.

assets | Added new UI sprites.

assets sound | Added sounds for geyser eruptions.

assets sound | Added biome music for sulfur caves: music.overworld.sulfur_caves.

assets breaking | The standing_sign and hanging_sign special item model types have been removed.

network | Added new opt-in telemetry event p2p_connection, sent after a peer-to-peer connection attempt.
